etymology.description: semantic 壴(壴) ('drum') + phonetic 冏(冏)
etymology.interpretation: The character 壺(hú, "jar") combines 壴(壴) (zhù, "drum") which resembles a container, with 冏(冏) (jiǒng) used phonetically to represent the sound. The intuition can be visualized as a container that holds, similar to a drum with its broader shape.

examples.chinese: 这个壶非常古老(這個壺非常古老)。
她用蓝色的壶泡茶(她用藍色的壺泡茶)。
examples.pinyin: Tā yòng lán sè de hú pào chá.
examples.english: She uses a blue jar to brew tea.

examples.chinese: 壶里装满了酒(壺裡裝滿了酒)。
examples.english: The jar is filled with wine.
